summary.current_demo_claim: Role Foundry trains an apprentice against public curriculum and teacher-only holdout lanes, with visible score deltas, inspectable receipts, and one honest external gateway roundtrip proof through Clawith.
summary.scope_note: The shipped public curriculum remains frontend/product-heavy even though the current framing is Software Engineer Apprentice.

stack.ui: Static browser demo plus read-only live/read-model shell

allowed_now: Static judge-facing demo and read-only live/read-model shell
Public curriculum plus teacher-only holdout separation contract
Teacher-driven source intake and public curriculum promotion workflow
Local private-holdout scaffold with fresh hidden holdouts kept outside tracked and student-visible artifacts
One honest external adapter-first Clawith -> OpenClaw gateway -> Claude/vibecosystem -> Clawith roundtrip, indexed by a tracked proof manifest.
blocked_now: Native Clawith parity claims beyond the single external gateway + Claude/vibecosystem executor proof.

fill_before_publish: Wallet / self-custody / participant metadata required by the submission portal
